name: ApplyTheme
returnDocumentation: Integer. Returns 1 if it succeeds and -1 if it fails. If any argument's value is null, the method returns null.
usageNotes: The ApplyTheme method should be called when all windows are closed.
The applied theme affects windows and visual controls except Line and Picture.
When Windows Classic is active, the application renders in the Windows Classic theme instead of the selected theme.

parameters.label: theme
parameters.documentation: Theme path and name to apply to the current application.
